response.justification: The candidate is a versatile polyglot engineer with strong web/full-stack experience and some systems-level work, but falls well short of the core requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, versus the required 8 years. Large-scale infrastructure exposure is confined to about two years of DLang-based low-latency services, and there is no formal technical leadership role leading cloud or platform teams — mentoring has been through workshops and courses rather than owning team-level technical strategy.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Broad polyglot engineering background with strong testing and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and open-source project leadership
concerns: C++ experience (~7 months professional) is far below the required 8 years
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure ownership; recent work is product-focused full-stack
No formal technical leadership role managing priorities, deadlines, and cross-team alignment
